conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately, overall?
A bit off. I get tired easily, and sometimes my mind just goes blank. I feel like I should be more productive, but I just can't seem to focus.
How long have you been feeling this tiredness and lack of focus?
A few weeks, maybe? I thought I was just being lazy, but it’s been going on for so long now that I’m starting to worry it’s something else.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Yeah, definitely. I can sit there staring at a screen for ages and not actually remember what I’m looking at. It’s frustrating because I know I’m not using my time well.
How long has it been since you first noticed this happening?
I think it started around the time I moved here. I used to be able to work for hours without a break, but now I just get restless after a few hours.
How have you been sleeping lately?
Not great. I wake up a lot, and when I do, I can’t go back to sleep. I just lie there thinking about everything I have to do the next day.
How long do you usually lie awake once you wake up?
A couple of hours usually. I try to just relax and wait for the alarm, but my mind is always racing.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Not really. I used to love going out, but now I just feel like I’m too tired to bother. I need to find something to shake me out of this slump.
How long has it felt too tiring to go out?
A few months, probably. I just can’t seem to find the energy to go out and do things anymore.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
Just more of the same, to be honest. I’m trying to push through, but it’s hard.
What makes it feel hard to push through right now?
I guess it’s just the lack of motivation. I know I should be getting things done, but I just can’t seem to get started.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
Yeah, definitely. I overthink everything, and then I just end up doing nothing. It’s really frustrating.
How long has that feeling of getting stuck in overthinking been going on?
A few weeks, maybe? It’s like my brain is just stuck on repeat, and I can’t seem to turn it off.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
No, not really. I try to push through, but I’m usually exhausted by the end of the day.
How long has it been since you've felt this exhausted by the end of the day?
A few months, probably. It used to be that I had plenty of energy for the evening, but now I just crash.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
Yeah, I guess. I just don't have the energy to actually do them.
What kinds of things feel too tiring to start?
Most things, honestly. I just can't seem to muster the energy to do much of anything.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
Yeah, probably. I just feel like I’m wasting time, you know? I should be doing more, but I just can’t seem to get going.
What does "doing more" look like to you?
Just being more productive. Getting things done. I used to be able to do that easily, but now I just feel like I’m stuck.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
Like I've wasted a lot of time. I should have been more focused.
What do you feel you should have been focusing on?
Just getting things done, I guess. I feel like I've been stuck in neutral for ages.
How's your appetite been?
It’s been okay, I guess. I eat because I have to, but I don't really enjoy it.
Have you noticed any changes in what or how much you're eating?
Yeah, I snack a lot more than I used to. I guess it's just a way to fill the time.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
Yeah, I get frustrated a lot. I just feel like I’m not doing anything right.
